title: 北师大版数学二年级下册知识覆盖率计划

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 平均分
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 理解平均分就是每份数量一样多，能判断和计算简单平均分情境。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 除法算式含义
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 理解除法可以表示平均分，能根据情境读懂除法算式。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 有余数除法
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 理解除完后剩下不够再分一组的数量叫余数，能计算简单商和余数。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 余数小于除数
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 理解余数必须比除数小，能判断一个有余数除法结果是否合理。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 除法解决实际问题
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能在情境中判断商和余数的意义，完成综合推理任务。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 判断每份是否一样多
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能判断一个分法是不是平均分。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 计算每份数量
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能根据总数和份数算出每份数量。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 根据情境选择除法算式
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把平均分情境转换成对应除法算式。
misconceptionNames: 把平均分情境写成加法

microKnowledgePoints.name: 理解商表示每份或组数
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能说清楚除法算式中商的实际含义。
misconceptionNames: 被除数、除数、商含义混淆

microKnowledgePoints.name: 计算商和余数
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能算出有余数除法中的商和余数。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 理解剩余数量含义
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能解释余数表示剩下不够再分一组的数量。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 比较余数和除数大小
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能判断余数是否小于除数。
misconceptionNames: 认为余数可以大于除数
认为余数可以等于除数

microKnowledgePoints.name: 修正不合理余数
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能发现并修正余数不合理的除法结果。
misconceptionNames: 认为余数可以大于除数
认为余数可以等于除数

microKnowledgePoints.name: 判断余数在情境中的意义
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能判断剩余数量是否能再组成一个完整小组。
misconceptionNames: 不理解剩余是否能再组成一组

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 辨认东南西北
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能根据给定方向判断东、南、西、北。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 在平面图中描述位置
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能在简单平面图中用方向描述两个地点的位置关系。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 辨认东北、东南、西北、西南
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能辨认和使用东北、东南、西北、西南。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 描述简单路线
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能按方向词读懂并描述简单路线。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 辨认基本方向
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能根据一个已知方向判断其他基本方向。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 判断相对方向
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能说出东和西、南和北是相对方向。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 描述地点位置
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能说出一个地点在另一个地点的什么方向。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 找到参照地点
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能先找准参照地点，再判断方向。
misconceptionNames: 用自己的方向代替图中方向

microKnowledgePoints.name: 辨认斜方向
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能辨认东北、东南、西北、西南。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 组合两个方向词
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把东和北合成东北，把西和南合成西南。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 按路线行走
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能按步骤读懂先后方向。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 描述路线
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能用简短方向词描述从起点到终点的路线。

units.name: 第三单元：生活中的大数

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 千以内计数
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 会用一百一百、一十一十等方式数较大的数。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 数位读写
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 理解千、百、十、个位上的数字表示多少。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 大数比较
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 先比位数，位数相同从高位比起。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 大数估计
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 先找一组大约多少，再推想总数。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 生活中的大数综合应用
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能综合运用本单元核心知识完成最终推理。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 综合推理本单元线索
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把多个线索合并判断最终答案。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 毫米
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 知道 1 厘米 = 10 毫米。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 分米
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 知道 1 分米 = 10 厘米，10 分米 = 1 米。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 千米
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 选择千米描述较长路线。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 选择长度单位
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 短小物体用毫米或厘米，较长路线用米或千米。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 测量综合应用
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能综合运用本单元核心知识完成最终推理。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 厘米毫米换算
misconceptionNames: 忘记 1 厘米是 10 毫米

microKnowledgePoints.name: 分米米换算
misconceptionNames: 忘记 10 分米是 1 米

microKnowledgePoints.name: 综合推理本单元线索
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把多个线索合并判断最终答案。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 三位数加法
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 个位对个位、十位对十位、百位对百位。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 三位数减法
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 某一位不够减时，要向前一位借 1。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 加减混合
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 先看题意，再按步骤计算。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 估算验算
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 先估大约，再精算检查。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 加与减综合应用
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能综合运用本单元核心知识完成最终推理。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 综合推理本单元线索
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把多个线索合并判断最终答案。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 角
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能在图形中辨认角。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 直角
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 直角像书本角、课桌角那样方方正正。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 长方形和正方形
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 长方形对边相等，正方形四条边相等，四个角都是直角。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 平行四边形
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 平行四边形的对边相互平行，形状可以斜斜的。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 认识图形综合应用
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能综合运用本单元核心知识完成最终推理。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 辨认正方形
misconceptionNames: 把所有四边形当长方形

microKnowledgePoints.name: 综合推理本单元线索
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把多个线索合并判断最终答案。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 时和分
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能用时和分描述较长活动。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 秒
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 用秒描述很短的时间。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 读钟面
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 先看时针，再看分针。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 经过时间
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 从开始时间按分钟往后数。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 时、分、秒综合应用
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能综合运用本单元核心知识完成最终推理。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 读几时几分
misconceptionNames: 时针接近下一小时就读错

microKnowledgePoints.name: 综合推理本单元线索
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把多个线索合并判断最终答案。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 调查问题
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 问题要让大家容易选择和回答。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 收集数据
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 一个人记录一次，避免重复或漏记。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 记录表
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 同类数据记在同一栏，最后合计。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 读懂数据
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 先找每类数量，再比较或相减。

expectedKnowledgePoints.name: 调查与记录综合应用
expectedKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能综合运用本单元核心知识完成最终推理。

microKnowledgePoints.name: 综合推理本单元线索
microKnowledgePoints.learningGoal: 能把多个线索合并判断最终答案。
